title: Nightly mirror sync skipped on Aug 14
description: Mirror pull from GitHub ridgeline didn't run overnight; cron likely missed after homelab reboot. Re-run and add an alert.
author: jmurray-dev

title: CI: cache Go modules between mirror builds
description: Build job re-downloads all modules every run. Add a module cache so the mirror pipeline finishes faster.
author: jmurray-dev

title: Deploy stage fails: missing KUBECONFIG secret
description: Mirror deploy job to homelab cluster can't authenticate. CI variable KUBECONFIG was rotated and not updated here.
author: jmurray-dev

title: Flaky integration test: bookmark_dedup_test
description: TestBookmarkDedup occasionally fails on the mirror runner due to timing on the Postgres container. Add a wait-for-ready.
author: jmurray-dev

title: Pin golangci-lint version in CI
description: Lint job broke when the latest golangci-lint changed default rules. Pin to a known version in the mirror pipeline.
author: sofia-reyes

title: Mirror README still points to GitHub badge
description: Pipeline status badge in README references the GitHub Actions run, not the GitLab mirror pipeline. Update or drop it.
author: jmurray-dev

title: Mirror sync drifted after force-push rebase
description: Rebased the glanceboard main on GitHub; mirror rejected the non-fast-forward push. Allow force on the mirror remote.
author: jmurray-dev

title: Add CI smoke test for uptime probe
description: Pipeline should run a quick smoke test hitting the probe endpoint before the deploy stage.
author: tomas-alvarez

title: Dashboard build warns on deprecated chart lib
description: Frontend build emits deprecation warnings from the charting library. Bump and adjust the API usage.
author: sofia-reyes

title: Mirror webhook not firing on tag push
description: Tagging a release on GitHub doesn't trigger the mirror tag pipeline. Check the pull-mirror schedule vs. tag events.
author: jmurray-dev

title: Terraform plan job needs read-only AWS creds
description: CI plan stage for homelab-k8s should use a scoped read-only role instead of the full key currently stored.
author: jmurray-dev

title: Validate manifests with kubeconform in CI
description: Add a lint stage running kubeconform against all manifests so bad YAML is caught before it hits the mirror deploy.
author: daniel-okafor

title: Mirror sync fails on large binary in history
description: A stray sealed-secrets blob bloats the repo; mirror push times out. Consider LFS or pruning the blob.
author: jmurray-dev

title: Document mirror restore procedure
description: Write a short runbook: if GitHub is down, how to promote the GitLab mirror as the source of truth.
author: jmurray-dev

title: CI test job has no Go version matrix
description: go-snippets only tests on one Go version. Add a small matrix so snippets stay compatible across releases.
author: jmurray-dev

title: Mirror sync noisy: empty nightly diffs
description: Mirror runs every night even when nothing changed, cluttering the pipeline list. Skip CI when the pull is a no-op.
author: jmurray-dev

title: Add example for context-aware worker pool
description: Requested a snippet showing a context-cancellable worker pool. Good candidate for the mirror's examples dir.
author: tomas-alvarez

title: Lint shell scripts in CI with shellcheck
description: dotfiles mirror should run shellcheck so the install scripts stay clean.
author: jmurray-dev

title: macOS install script breaks on Sequoia
description: Homebrew path changed; the bootstrap script assumes the old location. Detect the prefix dynamically.
author: jmurray-dev

title: Sync nvim config split into modules
description: Refactored nvim config on GitHub into lua modules; confirm the mirror picked it up cleanly and CI still passes.
author: jmurray-dev
